ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume in the last 24 hours */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap_dominance" REAL /* Market cap dominance percentage */,
  "fully_diluted_market_cap" REAL /* Fully diluted market cap */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average time to mine a new block */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Smart contract address (if applicable) */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the official website */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL of the whitepaper */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency id */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trading at the given timestamp */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market cap at the given timestamp */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price in the given timeframe */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price in the given timeframe */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price in the given timeframe */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price in the given timeframe */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 24 hours */,
  "change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 7 days */,
  "change_30d" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 30 days */,
  "source_exchange" TEXT /* The exchange from which the data was sourced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being traded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade occurred */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that initiated the trade */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username selected by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used to access the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the security setting record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the setting */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date when the password was last changed */,
  "last_2fa_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login with 2FA */,
  "last_ip_address" TEXT /* Last known IP address used to log in */,
  "session_timeout" INTEGER /* Session timeout duration in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being ordered */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (buy, sell, or limit) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of cryptocurrency in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price specified in the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the order was placed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the order */,
  "stop_price" REAL /* Stop price for stop orders */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger for stop orders (e.g., market, limit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The generated API key string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the API key (e.g., read, write) */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was last used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
